001/************************* PROJECT RON *************************/

005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.util;
007
008import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Vector2D;
009import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VFilter;
010import com.stuypulse.stuylib.util.StopWatch;
011
012public class TranslationMotionProfile implements VFilter {
013
014    // Default number of times to apply filter (helps accuracy)
015    private static final int kDefaultSteps = 64;
016
017    // Stopwatch to Track dt
018    private StopWatch mTimer;
019
020    // Limits for each of the derivatives
021    private Number mVelLimit;
022
023    private Number mAccelLimit;
024
025    // The last output / velocity
026    private Vector2D mOutput;
027
028    private Vector2D mVelocity;
029
030    // Number of times to apply filter (helps accuracy)
031    private final int mSteps;
032
033    public TranslationMotionProfile(
034            Number velLimit,
035            Number accelLimit,
036            Vector2D startingTranslation,
037            Vector2D startingVelocity,
038            int steps) {
039        mTimer = new StopWatch();
040        mVelLimit = velLimit;
041        mAccelLimit = accelLimit;
042        mOutput = startingTranslation;
043        mVelocity = startingVelocity;
044        mSteps = steps;
045    }
046
047    public TranslationMotionProfile(
048            Number velLimit, Number accelLimit, Vector2D startingTranslation, Vector2D startingVelocity) {
049        this(velLimit, accelLimit, startingTranslation, startingVelocity, kDefaultSteps);
050    }
051
052    public TranslationMotionProfile(Number velLimit, Number accelLimit) {
053        this(velLimit, accelLimit, Vector2D.kOrigin, Vector2D.kOrigin, kDefaultSteps);
054    }
055
056    public Vector2D get(Vector2D target) {
057        double dt = mTimer.reset() / mSteps;
058        for (int i = 0; i < mSteps; ++i) {
059            // if there is a accel limit, limit the amount the velocity can change
060            if (0 < mAccelLimit.doubleValue()) {
061                // amount of windup in system (how long it would take to slow down)
062                double windup = mVelocity.magnitude() / mAccelLimit.doubleValue();
063                // If the windup is too small, just use normal algorithm to limit acceleration
064                if (windup < dt) {
065                    // Calculate acceleration needed to reach target
066                    Vector2D accel = target.sub(mOutput).div(dt).sub(mVelocity);
067                    // Try to reach it while abiding by accel limit
068                    mVelocity = mVelocity.add(accel.clamp(dt * mAccelLimit.doubleValue()));
069                } else {
070                    // the position it would end up if it attempted to come to a full stop
071                    Vector2D windA = // windup caused by acceleration
072                            mVelocity.mul(0.5 * (dt + windup));
073                    // where the robot will end up
074                    Vector2D future = mOutput.add(windA);
075                    // Calculate acceleration needed to come to stop at target throughout windup
076                    Vector2D accel = target.sub(future).div(windup);
077                    // Try to reach it while abiding by accel limit
078                    mVelocity = mVelocity.add(accel.clamp(dt * mAccelLimit.doubleValue()));
079                }
080            } else {
081                // make the velocity the difference between target and current
082                mVelocity = target.sub(mOutput).div(dt);
083            }
084            // if there is an velocity limit, limit the velocity
085            if (0 < mVelLimit.doubleValue()) {
086                mVelocity = mVelocity.clamp(mVelLimit.doubleValue());
087            }
088            Vector2D error = target.sub(mOutput);
089            Vector2D unitError = error.normalize();
090            double parallelMag = mVelocity.dot(unitError);
091            Vector2D accelParallel = unitError.mul(parallelMag);
092            Vector2D accelPerpendicular = mVelocity.sub(accelParallel);
093            double damping = Math.pow(0.5, dt);
094            mVelocity = accelParallel.add(accelPerpendicular.mul(damping));
095            // adjust output by calculated velocity
096            mOutput = mOutput.add(mVelocity.mul(dt));
097        }
098        // Field.FIELD2D.getObject("Translation Motion Profile").setPose(!Robot.isBlue()
099        // ? new Pose2d(mOutput.x, mOutput.y, new Rotation2d())
100        // : Field.transformToOppositeAlliance(new Pose2d(mOutput.x, mOutput.y, new
101        // Rotation2d())));
102        return mOutput;
103    }
104}
